name: Antus Odiil
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial male. Wears lower class clothing consisting of a dark green shirt, laced leather pants, and stitched leather shoes. Armed with an iron longsword.
Race: Imperial
Personality Keywords: spirited, boastful, enthusiastic, thrill-seeking
Role: The younger son of Valus Odiil and brother to Rallus. He and his family were recently driven from their farm near Chorrol by goblins. Despite being a slightly less capable fighter than his brother Rallus, he makes up for it with his fighting spirit and enthusiasm for battle.
Home Location Information: Odiil Farm near Chorrol. Once the goblin threat is dealt with, he moves back into the farmhouse with his family.
Daily Routine - At the Farm: Antus sleeps from midnight to 6am in the farmhouse and has a two-hour meal at 10am. The rest of his time is spent either wandering around inside the farmhouse or helping to work the farm.
Personality - The Spirited Fighter: Antus embraces the thrill of combat and isn't shy about his confidence as a warrior. He enjoys a good fight and boasts about his fighting abilities after battles, displaying the enthusiasm and bravado of a young man eager to prove himself. While he may not match his brother's skill with a blade, his fighting spirit and determination help compensate for the difference. His attitude suggests someone who sees adventure and danger as exciting rather than frightening.
author: Bethesda
